channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17333] sanity test_119i: Fails with "FAIL: files differ"
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/789d7c93-8ca9-471c-9f21-d2c61fdea8d1

test_119i failed with the following error:

files differ

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/100630 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_8.x86_64 (ldiskfs)
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/100630 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 (ldiskfs)

Client logs. Nothing useful under server logs

 

== sanity test 119i: test unaligned aio at varying sizes ========================================================== 04:17:43 (1701490663)
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/aiocp
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
26214400 bytes (26 MB, 25 MiB) copied, 0.607774 s, 43.1 MB/s
CMD: trevis-63vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param n osd*.lustre-OST0000.nonrotational
bs: 1044480, align: 8, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1048576, align: 8, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1049600, align: 8, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1044480, align: 512, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1048576, align: 512, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1049600, align: 512, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
7729153 226 117
7729154 216 12
7729155 71 350
...
...
8388607 121 35
8388608 53 172
sanity test_119i: @@@@@@ FAIL: files differ@
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6735:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:13895:test_119i()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7075:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7131:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6961:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:13900:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-02/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_100630_31_95bf5c74-e960-4c0f-be88-eb3e8bf622a9//sanity.test_119i.*.1701490678.log
CMD: trevis-63vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-63vm2,trevis-63vm3,trevis-63vm6,trevis-63vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-02/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_100630_31_95bf5c74-e960-4c0f-be88-eb3e8bf622a9//sanity.test_119i.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1701490678.log;
>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-12-02/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_100630_31_95bf5c74-e960-4c0f-be88-eb3e8bf622a9//sanity.test_119i.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1701490678.log
 

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_119i - files differ
item.summary: sanity test_119i: Fails with "FAIL: files differ"

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
+1 master https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/573d2eb2-fb79-4a67-a122-4be91a513824

 
== sanity test 119i: test unaligned aio at varying sizes ========================================================== 13:27:39 (1723296459)
CMD: onyx-137vm6 getconf PAGE_SIZE
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/aiocp
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
26214400 bytes (26 MB, 25 MiB) copied, 0.615634 s, 42.6 MB/s
CMD: onyx-137vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param n osd*.lustre-OST0000.nonrotational
bs: 1044480, align: 8, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1048576, align: 8, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1049600, align: 8, file_size 26214400
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/f119i.sanity.2 has size 26214400 OK
bs: 1044480, align: 512, file_size 26214400
write missed bytes at 1044480 expected 1044480 got -14
sanity test_119i: @@@@@@ FAIL: unaligned aio failed, bs: 1044480, align: 512
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7169:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:14637:test_119i()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7514:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7577:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7400:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:14647:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2024-08-10/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_106767_56_e4746308-767c-4962-830b-2ca5fdba85cd//sanity.test_119i.*.1723296469.log
CMD: onyx-137vm11,onyx-137vm12,onyx-137vm4.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-137vm5,onyx-137vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-08-10/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_106767_56_e4746308-767c-4962-830b-2ca5fdba85cd//sanity.test_119i.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1723296469.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-08-10/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_106767_56_e4746308-767c-4962-830b-2ca5fdba85cd//sanity.test_119i.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1723296469.log
hitting this very often, can provide logs.
